description: Analyze the spatial distribution of cells in the fluorescence microscopy image at ~/Fiji_Data/workspace/cell_image.tif (scale: 1 px = 0.65 µm). Segment the cells and generate a Euclidean Distance Map (EDM) of the intercellular space, saving the result to ~/Fiji_Data/results/spacing/distance_map.tif. Extract cell centroids, areas, and Nearest-Neighbor (NN) distances, saving this data to ~/Fiji_Data/results/spacing/cell_measurements.csv with columns: cell_id, centroid_x, centroid_y, area_px, and nn_dist. Generate a summary report at ~/Fiji_Data/results/spacing/spacing_report.txt containing the keys: num_cells, cell_coverage_percent, mean_nn_distance_px, edm_mean_px, and edm_max_px. Save a visual QC overlay showing the original image with cell outlines to ~/Fiji_Data/results/spacing/qc_overlay.png.
